meta.title: Trampoline Gymnastics Club Management Software in Chile | Zaltyko - FGCh
meta.description: Manage your federated trampoline club with Zaltyko. Full control over athletes, categories, levels, Tumbling, DMT, Synchronized and FGCh licenses.

hero.headline: Manage your federated trampoline club with ease
hero.subheadline: Full control over athletes, categories, Tumbling, DMT, Synchronized levels and licenses. National Championship and selectivos.

painPoints.generic: Managing Tumbling, DMT and Synchronized gymnasts on paper is chaos. Level tracking doesn't exist.
painPoints.specific: Coordinating synchronized routines, managing difficulty scores, renewing FGCh licenses.
